title: Codex CLI Plugin Manifest (dotnet-ai-kit)
description: Schema for .codex-plugin/plugin.json per https://developers.openai.com/codex/plugins/build (lines 843-899). Manifest fields are scalar relative paths with the `./` prefix (e.g., `"skills": "./skills/"`), NOT object/array wrappers. Codex CLI's documented plugin primitives are skills, MCP, hooks, apps, and assets only. Native agents (OOS-004), LSP, monitors, settings, and bin MUST NOT appear in this manifest (per spec FR-002).

interface.description: Per Codex docs (developers.openai.com/codex/plugins/build:884-899): optional metadata field. Allowed value patterns per docs.

skills.description: Scalar relative path to the skills directory. The `./` prefix is required per Codex docs path rules.

mcpServers.description: Scalar relative path to the MCP servers config file.

hooks.description: Scalar relative path to the hooks config file.

apps.description: Scalar relative path to apps. Unused in v1.

assets.description: Scalar relative path to assets. Unused in v1.
